name: DMS Document Tools
description: Answers questions about the user's personal document archive. Always use action="chat" and pass the user's question as query. The bridge runs the full research loop and returns the answer directly — no further tool calls needed.
author: dms_ai_bridge

input.hint: Base URL of the dms_ai_bridge server
X-Api-Key header value for dms_ai_bridge authentication
Your AnythingLLM user ID (must be mapped in config/user_mapping.yml on the bridge server)
Maximum number of documents to return per search

examples.prompt: Search my documents for invoices from last year
Summarise the Tesla lease agreement for me
Who is the correspondent on document 42?
What document types do I have in my archive?
examples.call: {"action": "chat", "query": "What document types do I have in my archive?"}

action.description: Always use "chat". The bridge handles all research internally.

query.description: The user's question or request in natural language — required.
